" the struggle " 😄

Hello everyone!

Free Castle Blueprint Available for the Next 24 Hours!

For the next 24 hours, this castle blueprint will be available to anyone who would like a copy.

You can have it in exchange for whatever item or contribution you feel is fair. The exchange is mainly so I can keep a record of who received it, remember your name, and later visit to see how you’ve customized the castle, especially the interior design and modifications.

It’s essentially a free blueprint. I also think it’ll be fun to see what people choose to exchange for it!

You can visit my guild to check if you like it ( customisations such as bedroom, living room, kitchen, dinning or toilets can be done ….. design is for single person house)

The blueprint contains approximately 1,380 components.

If you would like a copy, send me a request within the next 24 hours and I will place it in your guild. Please note that blueprints/diagrams can only be placed in a guild.

I’m looking forward to visiting and seeing all the creative modifications and unique interiors everyone comes up with!
